about.approach_humanGates_description: Every AI output passes through human review gates before reaching production. Speed without blind trust.
about.approach_measurableRoi_description: Every engagement is scoped to a measurable business outcome — productivity, cost, or revenue.
about.approach_structureAi_description: We use AI to surface insights, automate repetitive work, and accelerate delivery — with humans validating every critical decision.
about.storyParagraph1: TeamX10 was founded by Artem — a software engineer who spent years watching teams struggle to adopt AI tools effectively. The bottleneck was never the technology. It was the process: how teams integrate AI into existing workflows, how they validate outputs, and how they measure impact.
about.storyParagraph2: We built TeamX10 to close that gap. Our approach combines battle-tested engineering practices with AI-native workflows — giving teams the speed of automation without losing control over quality.
about.storyParagraph3: Today we work with startups and scale-ups across Europe, delivering 200-400% productivity gains in engineering, content, and operations.
about.subtitle: We deliver AI solutions with human oversight — so your business grows faster.
about.title: About Us
about.values_humanFirst_description: AI is a force multiplier for your team, not a replacement for judgment.
about.values_pragmatism_description: We move fast, but not at the expense of quality or security.
about.values_scalability_description: Every solution is designed to grow with your business.
about.values_transparency_description: We show our work — you always know what AI is doing and why.
